title: Crispy Russian Toast
description: A simple Indian-inspired breakfast dish using crispy bread and a Russian twist.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Slice the crispy Russian bread into 1-inch slices.
Melt 1 tablespoon of butter in the pan and add 1-2 slices of bread.
Sprinkle cinnamon powder, sugar powder, and cardamom powder (if using) over the bread.
Drizzle milk over the bread and cook for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown.
Flip the toast and cook for another 2 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
Repeat with remaining bread slices and butter.
Serve hot with a dollop of ghee or clarified butter on top.
Garnish with chopped nuts or dried fruit (optional)
